events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: the failed vacuum decay test indicates a leaking braze joint and/or trapped moisture — this is a **fail**, high risk, since charging a system that hasn't proven leak-tight risks refrigerant loss, EPA 608 non-compliance, and premature compressor/system failure. Required actions: nitrogen leak search, re-braze the faulty joint(s), re-evacuate to the manufacturer's target microns, and document a passing decay test before the system can proceed to charging and inspection sign-off.
